name: GameRefinery
description: GameRefinery — mobile games market intelligence platform offering feature-level data, retention and monetization insights used by Zynga, King, Rovio, Ubisoft and FunPlus.

seo.title: GameRefinery — App Growth Tooling (ASO)
seo.meta_description: GameRefinery: GameRefinery — mobile games market intelligence platform offering feature-level data, retention and monetization insights used by Zynga, King, Rov

when_to_use: Feature-level competitive intelligence for mobile game design decisions
Retention and monetization benchmarking across genre and sub-genre
Tracking competitor Live Ops features for battle pass and event strategy
Market analysis for feature gaps and genre opportunity identification

pros: Feature-level data unique to mobile games
Retention and monetization insights at depth
Trusted by Zynga, King, Rovio, Ubisoft
cons: Requires analyst time to extract value
Less ASO workflow, more strategy intel
review.verdict: Best-in-class feature-level game intelligence, but priced for AAA mobile studios.
review.best_for: Mobile game studios designing features against market benchmarks
review.not_for: Indie games or non-game apps on small budgets

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
